nodes.name: Hen and Chicken Islands
nodes.summary: Hen and Chicken Islands是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括North Island saddleback，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 北島 (紐西蘭)
nodes.summary: 北島 (紐西蘭)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括New Zealand grebe、Black-fronted tern、Cook's petrel等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 北奥克兰半岛
nodes.summary: 北奥克兰半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括North Island saddleback，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: North Island saddleback
nodes.summary: North Island saddleback（North Island saddleback，学名 Philesturnus rufusater），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: North Island saddlebacks naturally occupy lowland broadleaf and coastal evergreen forests, though as a result of translocations, they are now also found in various other forest environments. Before the arrival of Europeans and the mammalian predators they introduced, North Island saddlebacks were widespread on the North Island mainland and offshore islands. A combination of deforestation and introduced predators – first brown rats and feral cats, then also black rats and mustelids – decimated these populations, and by the 1890s, the mainland population was eliminated, and the only remaining North Island saddlebacks were those on Hen Island, a small island off the coast of Northland
